Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Brown Line Service Experiencing Significant Delays Due to Raised Bridge
ShortDescription: Brown Line service is experiencing delays due to a raised bridge over the Chicago River, downtown.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line service is experiencing delays due to a raised bridge over the Chicago River, downtown.

Shuttle buses are available between Merchandise Mart and Clark/Lake to provide connecting service.
 
Some trains may be held in stations or turned back towards Kimball before reaching the bridge to maintain service across the remainder of the route. 

Bus shuttle service is available at Merchandise Mart and Clark/Lake. Listen for announcements and check train destination signs when boarding. Crews are working to correct the problem to allow us to safely resume service.
 
We apology for this temporary inconvenience and appreciate your patience while the Dept. of Bridge works to complete the bridge lift operation.  Allow extra travel time.
